texto: The mortality rate of literary friendships is high. Writers tend to be bad risks as friends ~ probably for much the same reasons that they are bad matrimonial risks. They expend the best parts of themselves in their work. Moreover, literary ambition has a way of turning into literary competition; if fame is the spur, envy may be a concomitant.
explicacao: Citação de Matthew J. Bruccoli sobre temas ligados a amizade. “The mortality rate of literary friendships is high. Writers tend to be bad risks as friends ~ pro…” articula amizade, fitzgerald, hemingway em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
